# bitrix.infra

Generic Docker Compose stack for a Bitrix CMS site (nginx + PHP-FPM + MySQL + Memcached).
Production identity attaches via a private docker-compose.override.yml.

- Architecture and service overview: Readme.md (Architecture section)
- Local demo (6 commands): Readme.md (Local demo section) or AGENTS.md
- Production overlay mechanism: Readme.md (Production overlay section)
- Getting started / environment setup: Readme.md (Getting Started section)
- AI agent quick reference and gotchas: AGENTS.md
- Script documentation: scripts/README.md
